Welcome to semicolon-wars. Before you open this PR, read CONTRIBUTING.md.
Every section below is required. PRs with skipped sections may be argued about
on procedural grounds before the substantive argument even begins — which, to
be fair, is also fine.
-->

## Grievance

<!-- What offends you, specifically? Be concrete. "Bad style" is not a grievance. "`var` on line 14 of battleground.js is an anachronism" is a grievance. -->

## Faction

<!-- Who do you speak for? Pick one from FACTIONS.md, or declare a new one (and open a new_faction issue in parallel). -->

## Proposed reformation

<!-- Describe the change in prose. The diff alone is not enough — we want the argument, not just the patch. -->

## Citations

<!-- List the authorities you are invoking. Acceptable: language specs, published style guides, named books, specific mailing-list posts with dates. Not acceptable: "common sense." -->

## Why this will never merge

<!-- MANDATORY. Write this in your own words, fresh each time. Boilerplate is discouraged and may itself become a subject of debate. -->

---

- [ ] I have declared a faction.
- [ ] I have cited at least one source.
- [ ] I understand this PR will not merge. Merging is a bug, not a feature.
- [ ] I am prepared to defend every line of this diff until the heat death of the thread.
